name: Cubby's Gothenburg Truck Plaza
description: Independent Cubby's truck plaza at I-80 Exit 211 with diesel, convenience store, deli and truck parking.

name: Nebraskaland Tire Truck Center
description: Commercial truck tire and repair center at I-80 Exit 237 in Lexington.

name: Sapp Bros Travel Center - Odessa
description: 24-hour Sapp Bros travel center at I-80 Exit 263 west of Kearney with diesel, Sapp Bros Cafe, showers, certified scales and tire repair.

name: Kearney Welcome Center (Rest Area)
description: Nebraska DOT welcome center and rest area west of Kearney (MM 269 EB / 270 WB) with restrooms and designated truck parking.

name: Fort Kearney Trading Post
description: 24-hour diesel stop at I-80 Exit 279 with convenience store, deli and paved truck parking.

name: Pilot Travel Center #912
description: 24-hour Pilot travel center at I-80 Exit 300 with diesel, Subway, showers and public laundry.

name: TA Grand Island
description: TravelCenters of America full-service travel center at I-80 Exit 305 (Alda) with restaurant, showers and truck service.

name: Grand Island Rest Area
description: Nebraska DOT rest area near the Platte River (MM 315 EB / 316 WB) with restrooms and truck parking.

name: Bosselman Travel Center / Pilot #902
description: Major Nebraska-owned Bosselman/Pilot travel plaza at I-80 Exit 312 with ~400 parking spaces, 20+ showers, restaurant, laundry, CAT Scale and an on-site Boss Truck Shop.

name: Love's Travel Stop #309
description: 24-hour Love's at I-80 Exit 332 with Arby's, 7 showers, CAT Scale and 3 Love's Truck Care service bays.

name: Petro Stopping Center #362 (Petro York)
description: Full-service Petro/TA stopping center at I-80 Exit 353 (US-81) with Iron Skillet restaurant, 16 showers, CAT Scale, TA Truck Service and 250 truck spaces.

name: Shoemaker's Travel Center

name: Waverly Weigh Station (Westbound)
description: Nebraska State Patrol westbound weigh-in-motion scale on I-80 near Waverly/Greenwood (about MM 415).

name: Waverly Weigh Station (Eastbound)
description: Nebraska State Patrol eastbound weigh-in-motion scale on I-80 near Waverly/Greenwood (about MM 415).
